description: Inventory of silver vessels and expensive fabrics belonging to the two Rabbanite synagogues in Fustat, which were given to Maḥfūẓ, the beadle of the Jerusalemite synagogue. Signed by Ḥiyyā b. Yiṣḥaq. Dated: Av 1470 Seleucid, which is July-August 1159 CE. The right side of this document is TS Misc.28.51 and the left side is TS NS J296. NB: This was previous listed as "Responsum of a Babylonian Gaon" on PGP. (Seems to be written by Meir b. Hillel b. Zadoq. AA)
description_he: מלאי כלי כסף ובדים יקרים של שתי בתי הכנסת הרבניים בפוסטאט, שנמסרו לשמש מחפוז. חתום: חייא בן יצחק. יולי-אוגוסט 1159.
